reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for enemy state animation and keep the champion root pivot consistent across every state.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/enemy_champion_idle_8f_8fps.png through AssetServer during enemy setup and cache the atlas under enemy_champion_idle_8f_8fps.
runtime_notes: Enemy remains in world space near the upper-right staging area.
Animation timer loops at 8 fps until a cast or defeat event replaces the state.
Forecast icon offset is authored against the idle head height.

context.usage: Default upper-class duelist stance between spell volleys and before forecast icons appear.

shape.silhouette: Academy champion with a high collar, long cape panels, and a staff focus held near the shoulder.

appendages.accessories: Staff focus, cape clasp, and shoulder sigil.

specs.texture: Layered cape cloth, polished staff metal, and a bright gemstone at the staff head.
specs.shading: Soft gradient shading with cool rim light along the left edge.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 960x180 px with eight 120x180 frames.
Staff tip remains inside a 28 px motion envelope so forecast icon placement stays stable above the head.
Cape silhouette keeps a readable negative gap between the torso and rear arm in every frame.
